law: The bundle identifier must support the following capabilities: Push notifications Communication notifications Time Sensitive notifications SiriKit To support communication notifications, the app’s file must contain a top-level entry with the key and type .
This array should contain if the app supports calling functionality, and if it supports messaging.
Accessing a user’s Focus status requires their authorization.
The app should donate both outgoing and incoming communication interactions.
To display a communication notification, your app should update the notification’s content.
Use the same intent object that initialized the interaction.
Accessing the user’s Focus status requires explicit user authorization.
To request authorization, use and parse the result.
Unauthorized apps don’t receive a Focus status value.
Ensure the app handles the Focus status case.
